description_long: This house features a low, wide profile with a prominent hip roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal bands of brown and light blue, giving it a modern yet inviting appearance. Large, rectangular windows are arranged in a regular pattern along the sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The main entryway is defined by a small set of steps leading to a recessed doorway, framed by a light blue overhang and flanked by columns. The structure appears to be a single-story residence, with a spacious footprint and a design that emphasizes horizontal lines. The overall look is clean and contemporary, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A single-story house with a hip roof, brown and blue horizontal exterior bands, and a recessed entryway with steps and columns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, columns, and a prominent overhang.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the horizontal window arrangement and the full expanse of the hip roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous horizontal bands and window pattern, with no visible entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended roof and additional window placements, as well as the side profile of the entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with steps, columns, and a flat overhang
